ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cysharp/UniTask
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cysharp/UniTask
Language: c%23
Provides an efficient allocation free async/await integration for Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Facepunch/sandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Facepunch/sandbox
Language: c%23
Sandbox mode for s&box

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Facepunch/sbox-public
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Facepunch/sbox-public
Language: c%23
s&box is a modern game engine, built on Valve's Source 2 and the latest .NET technology, it provides a modern intuitive editor for creating games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MapsterMapper/Mapster
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MapsterMapper/Mapster
Language: c%23
A fast, fun and stimulating object to object Mapper

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MonoGame/MonoGame
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MonoGame/MonoGame
Language: c%23
One framework for creating powerful cross-platform games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OrchardCMS/OrchardCore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OrchardCMS/OrchardCore
Language: c%23
Orchard Core is an open-source modular and multi-tenant application framework built with ASP.NET Core, and a content management system (CMS) built on top of that framework.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
Language: c%23
Technitium DNS Server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abpframework/abp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abpframework/abp
Language: c%23
Open-source web application framework for ASP.NET Core! Offers an opinionated architecture to build enterprise software solutions with best practices on top of the .NET. Provides the fundamental infrastructure, cross-cutting-concern implementations, startup templates, application modules, UI themes, tooling and documentation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/AspNetCore.Docs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/AspNetCore.Docs
Language: c%23
Documentation for ASP.NET Core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: icsharpcode/ILSpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/icsharpcode/ILSpy
Language: c%23
.NET Decompiler with support for PDB generation, ReadyToRun, Metadata (&more) - cross-platform!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mehdihadeli/awesome-software-architecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mehdihadeli/awesome-software-architecture
Language: c%23
📚 A curated list of awesome articles, videos, and other resources to learn and practice software architecture, patterns, and principles.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memstechtips/Winhance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memstechtips/Winhance
Language: c%23
Application designed to optimize, customize and enhance your Windows experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c%23
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/RulesEngine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/RulesEngine
Language: c%23
A fast and reliable .NET Rules Engine with extensive Dynamic expression support

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mono/SkiaSharp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp
Language: c%23
SkiaSharp is a cross-platform 2D graphics API for .NET platforms based on Google's Skia Graphics Library. It provides a comprehensive 2D API that can be used across mobile, server and desktop models to render images.
